name: polygres
description: Operate managed Polygres projects safely through the Polygres CLI.

interface.longDescription: Use the Polygres CLI to authenticate, select projects, import data, apply migrations, manage Runtime API keys, configure retrieval, and diagnose readiness or failures.
defaultPrompt: Log in to Polygres and help me select a project.
Import this JSON file into Polygres safely.
Diagnose why my latest Polygres import failed.
